ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the model type */,
  "model_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type */,
  "model_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the model type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "auc_avg" REAL /* Average AUC score across training epochs */,
  "auc_one" REAL /* AUC score for a specific model */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number during training */,
  "f1_avg_0_35" REAL /* Average F1 score at threshold 0.35 */,
  "f1_avg_0_36" REAL /* Average F1 score at threshold 0.36 */,
  "f1_avg_0_37" REAL /* Average F1 score at threshold 0.37 */,
  "f1_avg_0_38" REAL /* Average F1 score at threshold 0.38 */,
  "f1_avg_0_39" REAL /* Average F1 score at threshold 0.39 */,
  "f1_avg_best" REAL /* Best average F1 score obtained during training */,
  "f1_one_0_35" REAL /* F1 score for one instance at threshold 0.35 */,
  "f1_one_0_36" REAL /* F1 score for one instance at threshold 0.36 */,
  "f1_one_0_37" REAL /* F1 score for one instance at threshold 0.37 */,
  "f1_one_0_38" REAL /* F1 score for one instance at threshold 0.38 */,
  "f1_one_0_39" REAL /* F1 score for one instance at threshold 0.39 */,
  "fold" INTEGER /* Fold number in cross-validation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "mu" REAL /* Regularization parameter used in the model */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Random seed for reproducibility */,
  "th_avg_best" REAL /* Best average threshold value for F1 score */,
  "experiment_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment started */,
  "experiment_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment ended */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON column to store hyperparameters used in the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model type */,
  "metric_other1" REAL /* Other metric 1 */,
  "metric_other2" REAL /* Other metric 2 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* JSON column to store the report data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
